fields.title: Improve status/index.ts: replace throwing decoders with Effect-native approach
fields.description: decodeUnknownOrReject wraps Schema.decodeUnknownSync in try/catch and Promise.resolve/reject. The whole module is callback/promise-based with legacy TauState. Converting fully to Effect requires migrating the HTTP calls and pi event handlers.
fields.close_reason: Full Effect v4 migration of status/index.ts: async functions -> Effect.Effect with StatusBoundaryError, decodeUnknownOrReject -> Schema.decodeUnknownEffect + Effect.mapError, Promise.allSettled -> Effect.all + settleSection (Effect.result + Result.isSuccess), raw node https -> Effect.callback, parseGoogleProjectToken -> Schema.decodeUnknownOption + Schema.is. Service wrapper now directly uses Persistence instead of legacyBridgedLayer.
